name: KELLY SERVICES INC
summary: . History and Development of Business William Russell Kelly pioneered the staffing industry when he founded Kelly in 1946 and weve been reinventing it ever since. Our inception helped usher in and embolden a workforce of women who kept the economy moving forward during World War II, opening doors and creating completely new opportunities.
